data.title: Tesla Registrations Rise In EU In September But Not Enough To Make Up For Drop Through Year
data.description: American EV giant Tesla witnessed a 31% jump in new car registrations in September, marking a comeback from the drop in registrations throughout the year.

data.title: SoftBank-Backed Jellysmack Restructures, Lays Off Employees, And Scales Back Creator Program On Meta Platforms
data.description: In a bid to restructure its operations, Jellysmack, a SoftBank Group-backed creator-economy startup, is laying off employees and reducing its creator program.

data.title: Arkansas May Be Sitting On 19M Tons Of Lithium Amid Rising Demand For EV Batteries: How To Invest In What Elon Musk Calls 'The New Oil'
data.description: In a recent study, researchers have suggested that Arkansas could potentially hold a significant amount of lithium, a crucial component for electric car batteries and other high-tech products.
